headline: Transcript: Budget bonanza — tax highs and growth lows
summary: George Parker talks to Sam Fleming, Katie Martin and Stephen Bush
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the Political Fix podcast episode: ‘Budget bonanza — tax highs and growth lows’

[AUDIO CLIP PLAYING]

Voice clipBudget. Budget. Budget. Budget.

George ParkerWe’ve had weeks . . .

Voice clipBudget.

George Parker. . . Well, no, months . . .

Voice clipBudget. Budget. Budget. Budget. Budget. Budget. Budget. Budget. Budget.

George Parker. . . Of pre-Budget predictions and speculation.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

Voice clipThis is no ordinary Budget forecast and what might happen in the Budget.

Voice clipAnyone with money is waiting to find out what Rachel Reeves is gonna do in her Budget.

George ParkerThere were the hints and the rumours.

Voice clipIn a rare pre-Budget speech, the chancellor refuses to rule out tax rises in the upcoming Budget.

George ParkerAnd then of course, the U-turns.

Voice clipThe government has backed off and ministers say income tax won’t rise after all.

George ParkerBut when Rachel Reeves’ big moment to deliver her Budget finally ar
